homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Tinsita letimahhala nato-mtfombo-vulekile kusita libandla lakho kutsi lichume. Tfola tincwadzi tekucondzisa, imifundvo, kanye nemibhalo yekubhekisela yawo onkhe umkhicito wa-ChurchApps.

homepage.products.b1admin.description.message: Ibhodi yekuphatsa libandla yebantfu, emacembu, kuya enkontsini, iminikelo, nakunye lokunyenti.

homepage.products.b1website.description.message: Sayithi yelibandla lelucwaningo kanye nendlela yekungena yemalunga.

homepage.products.b1mobile.description.message: Uhlelo lwelucingo lwemalunga elibandla ku-iOS na-Android.

homepage.products.b1checkin.description.message: Uhlelo lwekungena lwekutitsatsela ekhiyoski kwematjabhulethi e-Android.

homepage.products.lessons.description.message: Luhlelo lwekufundza lolumahhala lwemabandla kanye nekuphatsa tifundvo.

homepage.products.freeplay.description.message: Uhlelo lwe-TV lwekukhombisa lokucuketse kwetifundvo etikhrini temakilasi.

homepage.values.free.description.message: Akukho kubhalisa, akukho emahlelo laphakeme, akukho tindleko letifihliwe. Wonkhe umsebenti umahhala kuwo onkhe emabandla.

homepage.values.openSource.description.message: Yonkhe ikhodi ingumtfombo lovulekile ku-GitHub. Imininingwane yakho ngeyakho, futsi ungatiphatsela wena nawufuna.

homepage.values.builtForChurches.descrip.message: Iyakliwe ngalokukhetsekile kwendlela yekusebenta yelibandla — akusiyo insita levamile lelungiselelwe umsebenti wenkontsini.

homepage.description.message: Imibhalo yekusekela ya-ChurchApps — tinsita letimahhala nato-mtfombo-vulekile tekuphatsa emabandla.

homepage.products.subtitle.message: Khetsa umkhicito kutfola tincwadzi tekulungisa, imibhalo yemisebenti, kanye netihloko letichazako.
